explanatory_text: An experimental GDP nowcast path used to validate the G10 mixed-frequency model pipeline.

faq.answer: No. It is an automated nowcast intended for monitoring and development use.
faq.question: Is this an official forecast?

faq.answer: Updated when a G10 vintage run is published
faq.question: When does it update?

methodology: This experimental GDP path validates the G10 mixed-frequency DynamicFactorMQ pipeline. It uses assembled FRED-MD and FRED-QD vintage inputs, processed monthly and quarterly panels, and a small DFM smoke fit. The current published value is a deterministic development proxy until the full replay and production DFM target extraction are complete.
update_cadence_label: Updated when a G10 vintage run is published
